channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 8 com severidade Alta
• 22 novas CVEs
• 5 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-7086 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
A vulnerability was identified in HBAI-Ltd Toonflow-app up to 1.1.1. This issue affects the function updateStoryboardUrl of the file replaceUrl.ts of the component Storyboard Export. Such manipulation of the argument url leads to path traversal. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. It is still unclear if this vulnerability genuinely exists. The vendor expl...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7086
 
🚨 CVE-2026-40970 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.0
Resumo:
When configured to use an SSL bundle, Spring Boot's Elasticsearch auto-configuration does not perform hostname verification when connecting to the Elasticsearch server. Affected: Spring Boot 4.0.0–4.0.5; upgrade to 4.0.6 or later per vendor advisory.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40970
 
📰 From Infrastructure to Agents: A Hands-On Guide to Secure Private AI with Broadcom – Part 1
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Part 1 of 4: Setting the Infrastructure – Networking and Deep Tenancy As enterprises rush to integrate AI into their workflows, moving from experimentation to production is often stalled by a critical hurdle: risk around security, privacy, and compliance. De-risking the AI enterprise requires more than just deploying a model behind a corporate firewall.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/27/guide-to-secure-private-ai-with-broadcom-part-1/
 
📰 VECT 2.0 Ransomware Irreversibly Destroys Files Over 131KB on Windows, Linux, ESXi - The Hacker News
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: 2.0
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a ESX, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTFBNYmRBSTZrdXQ3akpUOEVKR0JNUEVka2t2amtWZnFzZUZHdktCd1FiNFlONHlCcEVhNlFMOHlBYm9SRFRkNmg1THZtdFdaTnFhOUp2X2dCdUN4TTdDR2Z5UmJDTVQ2R2d6WG1XOTFzSEQyV2pVcE0tY3NR?oc=5
 
📰 Post-Quantum Readiness on VMware Cloud Foundation
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The algorithms that secure most digital communications today, such as RSA and elliptic curve cryptography, rely on math problems that traditional computers cannot solve in any reasonable amount of time, even with the computing advances of the last few decades. Quantum computers, however, work on fundamentally different principles. A traditional computer uses “bits” that hold …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/28/post-quantum-readiness-on-vcf/
 
📰 Registration Is Live for Las Vegas | $ave with Early-Bird
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/explore/registration-live-las-vegas/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Critical Unpatched Flaw Leaves Hugging Face LeRobot Open to Unauthenticated RCE
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.3
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a critical security flaw impacting LeRobot, Hugging Face's open-source robotics platform with nearly 24,000 GitHub stars, that could be exploited to achieve remote code execution. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-25874 (CVSS score: 9.3), which has been described as a case of untrusted data deserialization stemming from the use of the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/critical-cve-2026-25874-leaves-hugging.html
 
🚨 Microsoft Confirms Active Exploitation of Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
Microsoft on Monday revised its advisory for a now-patched, high-severity security flaw impacting Windows Shell to acknowledge that it has been actively exploited in the wild. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-32202 (CVSS score: 4.3), a spoofing vulnerability that could allow an attacker to access sensitive information. It was addressed as part of its Patch Tuesday update for this
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/microsoft-confirms-active-exploitation.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-31690 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: firmware: thead: Fix buffer overflow and use standard endian macros Addresses two issues in the TH1520 AON firmware protocol driver: 1. Fix a potential buffer overflow where the code used unsafe pointer arithmetic to access the 'mode' field through the 'resource' pointer with an offset. This was flagged by Smatch static checker as: "buffer overflow '...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31690
 
💣 After Mythos: New Playbooks For a Zero-Window Era
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
When patching isn’t fast enough, NDR helps contain the next era of threats. If you’ve been tracking advancements in AI, you know the exploit window, the short buffer that organizations relied on to patch and protect after a vulnerability disclosure, is closing fast. Anthropic’s new model, Claude Mythos, and its Project Glasswing, showed that finding exploitable vulnerabilities and subtle cracks
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/after-mythos-new-playbooks-for-zero.html
 
💣 Robinhood account creation flaw abused to send phishing emails
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Online trading platform Robinhood's account creation process was exploited by threat actors to inject phishing messages into legitimate emails, tricking users into believing their accounts had suspicious activity.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/robinhood-account-creation-flaw-abused-to-send-phishing-emails/
 
📰 GlassWorm malware attacks return via 73 OpenVSX "sleeper" extensions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new wave of the Glassworm campaign is targeting the OpenVSX ecosystem with 73 "sleeper" extensions that turn malicious after an update.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/glassworm-malware-attacks-return-via-73-openvsx-sleeper-extensions/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-7106 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The Highland Software Custom Role Manager plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation in versions up to and including 1.0.0. This is due to insufficient authorization checks in the hscrm_save_user_roles() function, which is hooked to the personal_options_update action accessible by any authenticated user. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access or higher, to pot...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7106
 
🚨 CVE-2026-6265 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Insecure preserved inherited permissions vulnerability in Cerberus FTP Server on Windows allows Privilege Escalation.This issue has been resolved in Cerberus FTP Server: 2026.1
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6265
 
🚨 USN-8202-2: jq vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 6.0
Resumo:
This update provides the corresponding update to Ubuntu 26.04 LTS. Original advisory details: It was discovered that jq did not correctly handle certain string concatenations. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service or execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-32316) It was discovered that jq did not correctly handle recursion in certain circumstances. An attacker could possibly use this issue...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8202-2
 
🚨 USN-8213-1: Vim vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
Michał Majchrowicz discovered that Vim's zip plugin could overwrite arbitrary files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to delete sensitive data or execute arbitrary code. This issue only affected Ubuntu 24.04 LTS and Ubuntu 25.10. (CVE-2026-35177) It was discovered that Vim's netbeans interface did not properly sanitize certain strings. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary commands.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8213-1
 
🚨 USN-8136-2: Dovecot regression
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 2.0
Resumo:
The update caused a regression on Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and Ubuntu 24.04 LTS. Original advisory details: It was discovered that Dovecot incorrectly handled invalid base64 SASL data. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service. (CVE-2025-59028) It was discovered that Dovecot script decode2text.sh incorrectly handled zip files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to obtain sensitive informat...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8136-2
 
💣 UNC6692 Hackers Exploit Microsoft Teams to Deploy SNOW Malware - Hackread
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMidEFVX3lxTE5ONVp6ZjBpUjZSUXBCRUJKc0tGT0FqcmxVbGFISndHUmptbWRpV2hhM1FtX0xrUVhHNzZ6ZDhNakFvbDNDNzVuLU9PS0FydERtSlFxQjlua3kxZUFwOE9BSUJqOU45ZHNqdzdqX1NpZDhkd09C?oc=5
 
💣 Arbitrum price outlook amid push for unfreezing of Kelp DAO exploit funds - CryptoRank
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxNdkkxS3JJcGRXUDRTbWZ3NUpBSG9FZXJXTG1CRDlQd2p3SkZMdzI0ZVprUkpyZUFPR2MwMnhCU0ItaVhQNFc4M0NKNU5TTnQxRTVUQ0p2UGs3Zm1Ka2NsMy15RGN1UDdVd0xYeVFlbzMwMXQ4TmpYWG01Si1iU3hLUEoyRGxESGlINWtVUnhlZE9oUFE5ejBiZmRKLTdFQ1MyS1ZESVFOcXVmU1RxNnBRQw?oc=5
 
💣 Pirates are daring teams to exploit one obvious weakness early - MSN
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 27/04/2026 e 28/04/2026.
